headline: JustStorage Reports 11.6% Revenue Growth in 2025, Outpacing Much of the Public Self-Storage Sector
summary: This April, JustStorage is celebrating 11.6% growth in occupied revenue in 2025, reflecting the company's continued momentum and underscoring the strength of its owner-first approach to self-storage management.

headline: Earnings Preview: What to Expect From Extra Space Storage's Report
